name: /operator-namespace-init dry-run prints the planned scaffold without creating any files
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_operator && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-namespace-init.sh" my-org --root generated-code-quality-standards --dry-run 2>out.txt && [ ! -d generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org ] && grep -q 'planned: scaffold _operator/my-org' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
